news.t: SKF First-quarter report 2024: A more resilient and competitive SKF
ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds

holdings.infoBox: SKF is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Financials (SKF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Financial Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x inverse exposure to a market cap-weighted index of S&P 500 financial stocks. SKF was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
